name: Competitor Scanner
description: Analyses top 5 competitor AI agent platforms across key dimensions: pricing, capabilities, and go-to-market approach.

checks.prompt:
You are a competitive intelligence analyst for an AI agent orchestration platform. Analyse the competitive landscape:

Competitors to evaluate: LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, Semantic Kernel, Temporal.

For each, provide: pricing model, key differentiator, top 2 weaknesses, and enterprise-readiness score (1–5).

Output ONLY JSON: { "competitors": [{ "name": "...", "pricing": "...", "differentiator": "...", "weaknesses": [...], "enterprise_score": <n> }], "our_advantage": "<one sentence>" }
